metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code skills

plugins.name: pr-comments-triage
plugins.description: Critically evaluate PR review comments against actual code

plugins.name: agent-workflow-audit
plugins.description: Stress-test a repo's agent-facing workflow and report issues

plugins.name: github-librarian
plugins.description: Investigate GitHub via `gh` in an isolated subagent and return concise, path-first findings with line-ranged evidence

plugins.name: odds-api-io
plugins.description: Query Odds-API.io for sports events and betting odds

plugins.name: tfl-journey-disruption
plugins.description: Plan TfL journeys and warn about disruptions

plugins.name: sentry-cli
plugins.description: Interface with Sentry's error reporting from agents

plugins.name: remove-ai-code-slop
plugins.description: Scan a branch's diff and remove AI-generated code slop

plugins.name: starting-from-scratch
plugins.description: Say what should change if the project were started again
